title.en: But the Fifth Realm didn't exist in the Fifth R...

content.en:
"The Holy Sea Realm Lord should be dead!"

He sensed in his darkness that the power of the oath he had made at the Kun Bronze Realm Lord Ruins had dissipated.

Although it was not him who killed the Holy Sea Realm Lord with his own hands, he also killed him, and it could be regarded as avenging the Kuntong Realm Lord, so it was naturally regarded as the fulfillment of the oath.

At this point, he was no longer affected by the oath of the Kun Bronze Realm Lord.

"The Holy Sea Realm Lord is already dead, and the Jiaye Wisdom Body Inheritance has already been handed over to the other replica bodies when they are on their way, they can't find out no matter how they check, unless they ask the existence of the Fifth Realm to deduce my traces!"

But the Fifth Realm didn't exist in the Fifth Realm, so he wasn't worried.

But when it comes to the inheritance of the wisdom body of the Ka Ye, there may be the existence of the fifth realm, and he may not be able to hide the existence of the fifth realm at that time.

"I still have to cultivate the Great Realm Armor Technique to the fourth layer!"

And after these years of penance, he is about to cultivate the Great Realm Armor Technique to the fourth layer.

He was able to cultivate so fast, naturally because of the improvement of his own cultivation and the realm of extradimensional rules, which made his efficiency in comprehending and cultivating the Great Realm Armor Technique skyrocket many times, otherwise if he was given another thousand extradimensional eras, he would not be able to practice to the fourth layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique.

"At most, in ten extradimensional eras, the fourth layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique can be cultivated!"

For the fourth layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique, he is also extremely looking forward to it.

In the days that followed, those fourth-realm extra-dimensional realms were frantically searching for Ye Tian's traces, but they didn't even know who it was, and the deduction traces were useless, and the deduction of the Ka Ye intelligent body was even more impossible.

Gradually, they completely abandoned the Kasaba Wisdom Body.

However, they are still staring at the sale of the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, if anyone buys the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf in the future, then they will definitely be secretly tracking and tracing it, and maybe they can find the third realm transcendent realm who has obtained the inheritance of the Ka Ye wisdom body.

Maybe there is hope for this move to recover the inheritance of the wisdom body of the Ka Ye!

......

"The inheritance of the wisdom body of the Ka Ye needs the Chi Ye Wisdom Leaf to have any hope of practice, but now it is undoubtedly impossible to buy the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, those forces who have the Ka Ye Wisdom Ye will inevitably stare at every extra-dimensional realm that tries to buy the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, if I buy it, I will definitely be targeted, and it is impossible to really buy it'!"

Ye Tian frowned, thinking about how to obtain a treasure like the Jiaye Wisdom Leaf.

If he could leave the 5,000 Territory and go to the 4,000 Territory, there should be a channel to buy it there, but he couldn't leave it.

Even in the extradimensional realm of the fourth realm, it is very difficult to break the boundary extradimensional barrier between the No. 5,000 realm and the No. 4,000 realm.

But if he didn't use the Kaba Wisdom Leaf, even if he used a replica body to forcibly cultivate the Kaba Wisdom Body, he would still fail.

After many failures, Ye Tian temporarily decided not to cultivate the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, and after finding the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, he would try to cultivate the Ka Ye Wisdom Body.

Subsequently, his next thoughts were mainly on improving the extradimensional rules and cultivating the fourth layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique.

Soon, ten extradimensional epochs passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's body appeared with countless striped patterns of the fourth layer of the Great Boundary Armor Technique, which gradually merged into the fourth layer of the Boundary Armor pattern, which also made his body have more subtle changes.

"Breakthrough, the fourth layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique has been cultivated, in this way, the fifth realm will not even want to deduce my traces, unless it is the sixth realm who is hands-on and good at deduction to deduce!"

But how can the sixth realm exist with the fragments of the Ka Ye wisdom body, even if it is a complete three-layer inheritance of the Ka Ye wisdom body, it may not be able to attract the existence of the sixth layer.

The existence of the sixth layer definitely has a complete innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance, and there is more than one one, so naturally they will not come here to find a mere Ka Ye wisdom body inheritance.

......

Territory of 5,000.

The Jiucai Chamber of Commerce held a grand auction and invited the third and fourth realms to participate.

Of course, most of them are based on the third realm, and there are very few resources suitable for the fourth realm, even if there are, it is impossible for the Jiucai Chamber of Commerce to come up with it!

Such an auction will basically be held once in thousands of extradimensional epochs or even tens of thousands of extradimensional epochs.

He was very interested in this auction, and it was rumored that there might be a Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Healing Essence for sale in this auction, such a Three-Realm Multi-Dimensional Healing Essence could definitely heal the injuries of the Moon Realm Lord and allow him to recover his cultivation.

Ye Tian wanted to heal the Moon Realm Lord, naturally not with a good heart, but with the cooperation with the Moon Appreciation Realm Lord.

If he heals her injuries, the Moon Lord will give him the Duowei Healing Bottle, and swear not to reveal the whereabouts of the Duowei Bottle.

Of course, he can also forcibly snatch, but he is not so shameless, and being able to trade to obtain nature is the best result.

In addition, he also wanted to see if there was a Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf auction in this auction.

If there is a Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf to make a move, it may mean that the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce is using this item as bait to attract him to appear.

But even if it's a bait, he has to bid.

Moreover, he did not participate in the auction as his real identity, but as a copy of the third realm transcendent realm in the Blazing Sun Palace, he had inquired about the news, that third realm was in retreat somewhere, and he was participating in the auction as the other party, and it would not be exposed in a short time.

And he bids for the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf, and the Jiucai Chamber of Commerce will not immediately make a move against him, which gives him time to transfer the Ka Ye Wisdom Ye.

As time passed, more and more third realms came to participate in the auction.

Finally, it's time for the auction (Zhao Dehao).

......

The auction was of a very high grade, and at the beginning of the auction it was an extremely rare high-level extra-dimensional weapon.

Subsequently, various resources were put up for auction one after another, and the third realm participated in the bidding.

And Ye Tian did not participate in the auction from beginning to end, and those were not the treasures he valued.

After a while, the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Healing Essence was taken out and auctioned for Xin.

"'Everyone, the next bid is a drop of multi-dimensional essence, and it is a healing multi-dimensional essence, and the starting price is one million super dimensional dao coins!"

For the Third Realm, one million Super Dimensional Dao Coins is nothing, and the Multi-Dimensional Essence can heal any injuries in the Third Realm!

Even a drop is precious enough.

In an instant, many third realms participated in the auction.

Ye Tian also participated in the auction, vowing to win this drop of the Three Realms Multi-dimensional Healing Essence.
